PushEvent:yasyf/captain-hook.summary: parsed commands structurally instead of regex-matching the teammate denylist

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-present.summary: auto-trusted synckit mesh hosts on the HTTP plane and hardened the iOS token store to device-only

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-runtime.summary: hardened the iOS bearer-token Keychain to device-only and made the token store atomic and race-safe

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-skills.summary: pointed ccx's dep-source, CI-triage, web, and enumeration lanes at the shipped reader subagents

PushEvent:yasyf/fusekit.summary: resolved the App Group container via NSFileManager

PushEvent:yasyf/homebrew-tap.summary: dropped the deprecated cookiesync-keyhelper cask, superseded by authkit

authkit@v0.1.0.summary: first release: the AuthKit library and authkit helper CLI, with a Developer-ID .app cask pipeline

captain-hook@v9.25.0.summary: added the capt-hook hooks active-hook inventory and routed create-PRs by change shape

cc-context@v0.26.0.summary: ship now runs prek pre-commit hooks before committing

cc-pool@v0.59.0.summary: ships the daemon as a profiled .app bundle and resolves the file-provider bridge through the app-group container

spawnllm@v0.6.2.summary: codex backend pins service_tier=fast; stopped dropping the user's tier pin
